page.content: As Suez SA continues to advance its commitment to environmental sustainability and responsible waste management, the accompanying data table provides a comprehensive overview of key metrics related to waste collection volume trends, carbon offset project pipelines, and contaminated site assessments across North America.

lines.text: As Suez SA continues to advance its commitment to environmental sustainability and responsible waste management, the
accompanying data table provides a comprehensive overview of key metrics related to waste collection volume trends, carbon
offset project pipelines, and contaminated site assessments across North America.

page.content: Notably, the table highlights a projected residential waste collection volume of 15,000 tons by March 2025, reflecting our proactive approach to managing increasing waste generation amidst growing urbanization. In tandem with these efforts, our pipeline for carbon offset projects emphasizes the critical role of renewable energy initiatives, such as the planned installation of wind turbines, which are anticipated to contribute significantly to our overall sustainability goals.

lines.text: Notably, the table highlights a projected residential waste collection volume of 15,000 tons by March 2025, reflecting our
proactive approach to managing increasing waste generation amidst growing urbanization. In tandem with these efforts, our
pipeline for carbon offset projects emphasizes the critical role of renewable energy initiatives, such as the planned installation of
wind turbines, which are anticipated to contribute significantly to our overall sustainability goals.

page.content: Furthermore, the financial metrics presented indicate a total investment of CAD 450 million allocated for these projects, underscoring our commitment to environmentally responsible practices that deliver both economic and ecological benefits.

lines.text: Furthermore, the financial metrics presented indicate a total investment of CAD 450 million allocated for these projects,
underscoring our commitment to environmentally responsible practices that deliver both economic and ecological benefits.

page.content: This strategic alignment with sustainable development principles not only enhances our operational efficiency but also reinforces our leadership position in the environmental services sector.
